Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Default Judgment Of Forfeiture.

The People's unopposed Motion for Default Judgment of Forfeiture is granted. The court will sign the Default Judgment for Forfeiture in the form presented.

Order and Default Judgment for Forfeiture are signed. (see scanned order for details)
